title: Hieracium artabirense

Its classification makes it a member of the large and diverse Asteraceae family.

intro: Hieracium artabirense is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), commonly found in mountainous regions of Europe and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Hieracium artabirense include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Hieracium artabirense include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and to reduce inflammation.
